creator: sada@e-mail.ne.jp
text:
>> I'm sorry, but I don't really understand this PR.  We don't have a port
>> of iij-ppp, it is part of the base system.  If you can help me
>> understand this submission, I'll route it to the correct person.

I'm sorry too that I'm so late for replying your mail.
At the 2.2.6-RELEASE, build in user-ppp command had some trouble and
Mr.Brian's current version was good, so I had thought that the port
was useful.

BTW, now, I've got a new ppp-port (2.2.7-RELEASE base), that has another
nat-extentison (could through many protocols than the original alias
function), and time scheduling function (stops on-demand dialing while
the time specified by the user).
Could I send the new version port ? How do you think ?
